# MarkSyncr

> Cross-browser bookmark sync with bring-your-own storage. By Profullstack, Inc.

MarkSyncr is a browser extension and web service that keeps your bookmarks in sync across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, Brave, and Opera. You choose where your data lives: GitHub, Dropbox, Google Drive, a local file, or MarkSyncr's managed cloud. The service never sees your bookmarks unless you opt into the managed cloud.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://marksyncr.com/) — Product overview, features, pricing, and storage options
- [Docs](https://marksyncr.com/docs) — Getting started guide, storage setup, FAQ
- [Pricing](https://marksyncr.com/pricing) — Free, Pro ($5/mo), Team ($12/mo)
- [Privacy Policy](https://marksyncr.com/privacy) — Data handling, GDPR rights, contact
- [Terms of Service](https://marksyncr.com/terms) — Subscription terms, cancellation policy
- [Sign Up](https://marksyncr.com/signup) — Create a free account
- [Contact](https://marksyncr.com/contact) — Support and sales inquiries

## Product

- **Name**: MarkSyncr
- **Category**: Browser extension / bookmark sync
- **Browsers**: Chrome, Firefox, Edge (all plans); Safari (Pro+); Brave, Opera (all plans)
- **Storage backends**: GitHub, Dropbox, Google Drive, local file, MarkSyncr Cloud
- **Key features**: Two-way sync, conflict resolution, folder structure preservation, version history, offline support, instant sync
- **Open source**: https://github.com/profullstack/marksyncr.com (MIT)

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0/month — Unlimited bookmarks, MarkSyncr Cloud, GitHub/Dropbox/Google Drive sync, Chrome & Firefox, 5-day version history
- **Pro**: $5/month — Everything in Free + Safari support, priority sync, 30-day version history, priority support
- **Team**: $12/month — Everything in Pro + shared folders, team management, admin controls, 1-year version history, dedicated support

## Company

- **Legal name**: Profullstack, Inc.
- **Support**: support@marksyncr.com
- **Privacy**: privacy@marksyncr.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/profullstack/marksyncr.com
- **Discord**: https://discord.gg/U7dEXfBA3s
- **Chrome extension**: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/marksyncr/hjcjjcpialiakkalcgadnfnoomdaegjg
- **Firefox add-on**: https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/marksyncr/
